notes: Manual curation template for the next benchmark target. Fill these fields only after reviewing the official HKU_MDASC seed pages or the checked-in official-seed raw captures.

fields.english_requirement: Applicants must satisfy the HKU higher degree English language requirement; refer to the University admissions requirements page for details.
fields.academic_requirement: Applicants should have completed at least one course in calculus and algebra, one course in computer programming, and one course in introductory statistics or related areas.
